case_title: SHAWN J. GOAD VS. SUESANNA SHAW

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $377.33 FILED BY GOAD, SHAWN J. AS TO DEFENDANT SHAW, SUESANNA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-30-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOAD, SHAWN J. ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-12-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SHAW, SUESANNA
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM BETSY JOHNSEN FILED BY GOAD, SHAWN J.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOAD, SHAWN J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHAW, SUESANNA $754.66 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $754.66, DAMAGES INCLUDES $377.33 IN ACTUAL DAMAGES PLUS $377.33 IN STATUTORY DAMAGES AS PER CC1995(L). STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-30-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-30-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-30-2009 - JUDGMENT.
